name: orangehrm-playwright-automation
description: End-to-end automation suite for OrangeHRM using Playwright and TypeScript

scripts.test:regression: npm run clean:auth && npx playwright test --project=regression-chromium
scripts.test:allure: npx playwright test && cp issue-categories.json allure-results/ && npx allure serve allure-results

author: Deepak Yadav <ydeepkcs@gmail.com>
